purpose: load_graphml over the committed zero-node fixture: the file parses into an empty DiGraph (pyreason.py:577), parse_graph_attributes walks nothing, and reason(timesteps=1) with an inert never-grounding rule completes without raising — the step outcome banks {'raised': false}, get_time reads 1 and interpretation_dict is {'0': {}} — the bound-empty-graph class. Authored in steps form so a raising reason would have compared as data rather than failing the capture (it did not raise); the inert rule clears reason()'s no-rules guard, which raises 'There are no rules...' regardless of the graph (observed at authoring when this case first ran rule-less).
provenance: spine case against docs/surface.md fn:load_graphml bound-empty-graph
